pages.title: Reach the Network
pages.text: The Radio Transmitter is your link to the surviving logistics network. Place one at a secure base, then use it to review available work, accept contracts, and collect courier deliveries when they arrive. Stay near a calibrated transmitter while handling network business.

pages.title: Build a Transmitter
pages.text: Copper and iron form the receiver, mounted on a plank base. Build one early: city finds become much more valuable once they can be turned into requests and deliveries.

pages.title: Field Setup
pages.text: A transmitter is best kept indoors, supplied, and easy to reach after an expedition.

pages.title: Network Contacts
pages.text: Dr. Mara Voss, the Medic, provides medicine. Elias Ward, the Quartermaster, provides ammunition. Rook provides recovered guns. Nadia Vale provides transport and route-support utility. Complete their work and claim the resulting courier deliveries through the transmitter.
